home.title: Welcome to TradeLog
home.description: Track and manage your trades efficiently.

hero.title: Master Your Trading with AI-Driven Insights
hero.description: Track every trade, analyze your performance with AI, and build winning strategies. The most comprehensive trading journal for crypto and forex traders.

features.title: Everything You Need
features.subtitle: Powerful tools to transform your trading
features.journalDesc: Log every trade with detailed entry/exit data, psychology notes, and market conditions.
features.analyticsDesc: Get AI-powered insights on your trading patterns, win rates, and areas for improvement.
features.calendarDesc: Visualize your daily, weekly, and monthly performance at a glance.
features.setupsDesc: Define and track your trading setups to find your most profitable strategies.
features.exchangesDesc: Connect your exchange accounts to automatically import trades.
features.aiDesc: Chat with AI about your trading performance and get personalized recommendations.

cta.title: Ready to Level Up?
cta.subtitle: Start your 3-day free trial today. No credit card required.

login.title: Welcome Back
login.subtitle: Sign in to your trading journal
login.trial: New users get a 3-day free trial
login.terms: By signing in, you agree to our Terms and Privacy Policy.

trades.noTrades: No trades yet. Start by adding your first trade.

setupsTab.title: Trade Setups
setupsTab.subtitle: Manage your favorite trading setups and track their performance
setupsTab.noSetups: No setups yet. Create your first trading setup to start tracking performance by strategy.
setupsTab.name: Name

settingsTab.apiWarning: We recommend creating read-only API keys. Your keys are stored securely and are never shared.
settingsTab.noExchanges: No exchanges connected yet. Add your exchange API keys to import trades automatically.

chat.title: AI Chat
chat.aiDescription: Get insights about your trading performance, patterns, and improvement areas.
chat.emptyChat: Ask me about your trading performance, patterns, or areas for improvement.
chat.error: Sorry, something went wrong. Please try again.

onboard.welcome: Hey {name}! Welcome to TradeLog. I'm your AI trading assistant and I'll help you get set up in just a minute.
onboard.exchangePrompt: Let's start by connecting your exchange account so we can track your trades. Which exchange do you use?
onboard.exchangeSkipped: No problem! You can always connect an exchange later from Settings.
onboard.exchangeFormIntro: Fill in your exchange API credentials below. Make sure to use read-only keys for security.
onboard.exchangeConnected: {name} connected successfully! Your trades will be synced automatically.
onboard.setupPrompt: Now let's set up your first trading strategy. Setups help you categorize trades and track which strategies perform best. Would you like to create one?
onboard.setupPromptAfterSkip: Now let's set up your first trading setup. Setups help you categorize and track the performance of different strategies. Would you like to create one?
onboard.setupFormIntro: Tell me about your trading setup:
onboard.setupMore: Would you like to add another setup, or are you ready to start trading?
onboard.finishing:
You're all set! Your 3-day free trial is active with full access to AI analytics, PnL tracking, and more.

Let's get you to your dashboard!
onboard.inputPlaceholderExchange: Type 'yes' to connect or 'skip' to continue...
onboard.inputPlaceholderSetup: Type 'yes' to add a setup or 'done' to finish...
onboard.settingsLater: You can always change these settings later from your dashboard
onboard.apiWarning: We recommend read-only API keys. Your credentials are stored securely.
onboard.setupNamePlaceholder: e.g. EMA Pullback, Breakout, Supply & Demand
onboard.setupRulesPlaceholder: When do you enter? What confirmations?

sync.tradeOf: Trade {current} of {total} — Tell us about this trade
sync.whyEnter: Why did you enter this trade?
sync.whyEnterPlaceholder: What signal or setup triggered this trade?
sync.psychologyPlaceholder: How were you feeling? Any emotional bias?
